summary: Iteration 20 — Telegram bot integration + PWA + mobile-app-feel UI. All 12 backend pytest tests passed (auth, telegram status/link code, webhook secret, /start linking new chat, text-command advance transaction, conversational fallback, pending-media worker file routing, callback_query cancel, PWA manifest/sw.js/icon). All frontend flows verified: mobile bottom nav with 5 tabs + AI FAB, More slide-up sheet with profile + logout, mobile Telegram Assistant card shows Linked badge + Disconnect, desktop sidebar nav across Workforce/Payroll/Reports works cleanly, no DOM/console errors surfaced.

minor.issue: Some AI attempts fail with 'Budget has been exceeded' warnings (litellm.BadRequestError). Handler retries and text webhooks still return 200, so functional flow is unaffected — but heavy AI-dependent flows (advance parsing, pending routing) may occasionally fall back to no-op. Consider bumping budget or handling gracefully.

action_items: Optional: raise Emergent LLM budget cap — logs show 'Max budget: 0.001' triggering BadRequestError on some webhook AI calls. Not blocking (fallback path returns ok:true), but reduces reliability of natural-language routing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2500 lines — could be split (telegram/, ai/, workers/, reports/ modules) for maintainability.
Historic traceback in backend.err.log for ai_text(provider=...) TypeError — resolved after latest hot-reload (function signature now accepts provider/model). No active bug.
telegram_webhook silently accepts and returns ok:true on unhandled updates (correct for Telegram).
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_karya1 (user test-user-karya1) — verified working. DB karya_db_v2.
seed_data_creation: Created worker TEST_Suresh via /api/workers for advance/pending tests. Two telegram_pending docs inserted then consumed/cleared during pending-media flow tests. QA user relinked to chat 999000111 at end of /start test to keep state sane.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration20_telegram.py covers full Telegram webhook surface (link, text advance, conversational, pending photo worker-file, callback cancel, wrong secret) + PWA. Reuse as regression. Webhook secret: karya-tg-hook-7f3a9c2e. LLM 'budget exceeded' warnings in logs are non-blocking — webhook returns 200 either way.
